feed.subject: feat(proof)+fix(docs): drop-your-own-bundle verifier + CLI docs rewritten to the real, published CLI
fix(product): land the dual-Codex fix set for #116 (re-cut onto main) (#118)
feat(product): Lane B — onboarding state machine + remaining unified API wrappers (#116)
docs(install): make the quickstart copy-paste actually finish — verified from scratch (#27)
Onboarding /start — grey-score aha, segmentation, GET RUNNING checklist (#26)
Runtime Score MVP — /score (six MEASURED-only sub-scores) (#25)
feat(product): F3 (safe slice) — local offline entitlement verifier (#115)
feat(product): F2 — compute.route dry-run + continuity store/retrieve (#114)
feat(product): F1 — FE-unblocking read APIs + onboarding state (#113)
fix(security): strict-auth + WS denials persist to the denial-audit sink (#112)
copy: world-terms sweep — BYOK → "your own AI accounts" (founder-approved wording) (#24)
Hero eyebrow removed; kit lockup (mark+wordmark) across every surface (#23)
reland(terminal): PTY sessions — recover #109 (merged into an orphaned stacked base) (#111)
feat(mesh): periodic node heartbeat — liveness as a measured, bounded local trace (#110)
Logo suite v2 — kit mark, SVG favicon, footer lockup, gradient tokens (#22)
Brand System v2 — kit tokens, astronaut loading screen, pillars, og image (#21)
feat(terminal): Atmos Terminal slice 1 — read-only /term file/log/metrics/receipt APIs (#108)
feat(security): denial-audit sink — denials leave a persistent, bounded, secret-safe trace (#107)
Runtime Score emitter — six MEASURED-only sub-scores (unblocks Runtime Score MVP FE) (#20)
Choreography — preloader, founder headline, honesty-ledger set-piece, canonical pricing, motion-guard (#19)
Motion foundation — written motion system, GSAP+Lenis single RAF loop, split-line headlines (#18)
Enterprise Brand System v1.0 — brand tokens, type system, lenis, Orbital Pulse, funnel CTAs (#17)
feat(status): live runtime fetch of the cron-published status feed (ISR, fail-safe to baseline)
feat(auth): styled success/error state · post-login redirect · mobile overflow fix (#16)
feat(status): launch-readiness tile — transparent production-readiness percentage (#15)
fix(proof): mirror legacy v0 receipt-body versioning into the browser verifier + publisher (#14)
feat(gate2b): mesh-side command authorization + revocation (#106)
feat(gate2): cryptographic owner identity + explicit node-pairing ceremony (#105)
fix(receipts+tap): P1 residue — live-receipts test into CI, receipt-log rotation, fail-visible telemetry (#104)
fix(receipts): body-version legacy v0 receipts — pre-owner_wallet chains verify again (#103)
feat(status): operating-layer proof layer — verdict bar, in-browser hybrid-PQC receipt verify, runtime intelligence, landing Proof strip (#13)
docs(activation): gateway secret SET + enforced live (#58 closed) (#102)
feat(security): vault hydration for ATMOS_GATEWAY_SECRET (#58) (#101)
fix(metrics): count live-receipts.jsonl in trust_events (P1 rollout) (#99)
feat(continuity): live tap mints signed receipts by default (SPRINT_002 #2) [PARTIAL] (#98)
fix(honesty+governance): post-merge blockers #88/#95/#96 from the GitHub-side Codex review (#97)
feat(honesty): automated claim gate in CI — banned/false claims fail the build (#77) (#91)
fix(status): honest two-state framing, drop 'live/real-time' overclaim (EFL-010) [reopened] (#12)
docs(governance): first-party AGENTS.md + root LICENSE (#78) (#92)
docs(trust): skill-seal integration comment — the P2pSkillSync gate is DONE, not a follow-up (#81) (#94)
feat(activation): canonical activation matrix + compounding-intelligence metrics (#79) (#93)
feat(trust): carve-sync drift gate — canonical PQC primitive enforced byte-identical across public mirrors (#75, #76) (#90)
fix(honesty): honest model ids, no fake qwen on receipts (EFL-007) [reland of #67] (#89)
fix(security): close cross-channel context-bleed in vector RAG (EFL-003) (#73)
fix(gateway): upstream circuit-breaker + heap config (EFL-014) (#74)
fix(honesty): /vision no longer fabricates screen contents (resolves #62) (#66)
docs(honesty): reconcile qwen->gemma in README + doctrine, part 1 (EFL-001) (#69)
docs(honesty): qwen->gemma in routing docs, part 4 (EFL-001 final) (#72)
docs(honesty): reconcile qwen->gemma in ARCHITECTURE/NORTH_STAR/GROUNDED (EFL-001 pt3) (#71)
docs(honesty): reconcile qwen->gemma in canonical docs + fix adapter under-claim (EFL-001 pt2, EFL-013) (#70)
fix(billing): getLiveBalance fails closed, never fabricates a balance (EFL-012) (#68)
docs(operating): operating system + merged audit backlog (resolves #61) (#64)
fix(web): remove footer dead links + noindex /app preview surface (web hygiene) (#11)
fix(ci): honesty-guard self-test false positive (resolves #5) (#9)
fix(ci): hermetic Composio test green in CI via catalog fixture (resolves #59) (#65)
docs(doctrine): establish the Founding Operating Doctrine canon
chore: refresh activity feed
fix: expose config-needed status truth
feat: ship public Stratos install flow
chore(test): make 'npm test' the honest hermetic suite, not the mock harness
fix(api-shim): harden shutdown so optional channel adapters can't throw during PM2 reload
fix(local-inference): report the actual local model; stop silently forcing gemma2:2b
docs(truth): reconcile stale mocks — peer-compute/mesh is REAL (node bundle); on-chain rewards intentionally not-live (not a stub)
docs(truth): correct stale 'Cloud tier unimplemented' — it's built + tested (BYOK + OpenRouter, 47 checks)
merge(security): exec job-policy gate + symlink-traversal hardening (trust substrate → live)
fix(web): real working install — efficientlabs.ai/install.sh + @efficientlabs/stratos
feat(web): live Stripe checkout — monthly default + annual toggle (2 months free)
feat(web): dark default + glassmorphism + per-command copy + real status + customizable OS
feat(web): OS light-first theme + Mobbin dashboard, distinct in-depth nav pages, 5-tier pricing, live status feed
fix(api-shim): shutdown handler — rename param shadowing the SignalAdapter (signal.stop TypeError)
feat(stratos): operating-core live tap — flag-gated, default-off, fail-open (deep phase increment 5)
feat(stratos): model-agnostic routing — policies + unified adapter (deep phase increment 4)
feat(stratos): self-improvement compression engine (deep phase increment 3)
feat(stratos): eval-engine (deep phase increment 2)
feat: sovereign Composio adapter + operating-architecture layer (docs + files-first core)
chore: deploy author verification [redacted]
docs: architecture + context-routing (operating architecture layer)
feat(web): Atmosphere OS at /app (11 honest modules) + mobile & motion polish
chore(web): add marketing ad images + commercial videos (own-your-ai, stop-paying-rent, efl-commercial 16x9/9x16)
feat(web): nav→standalone pages, ChatGPT-style /docs, mobile fixes
